method: ffmpeg frame extraction + PIL brightness analysis + vision reads of DAMAGE-counter/popup crops. No OCR/tesseract available.

meta.battle_time: 03:00 (180s); top-right timer counts DOWN from 03:00, elapsed = 180 - timer
meta.full_burst_note: Jill is Burst III; solo cannot chain I->II->III, so ZERO Full Bursts. Confirmed: no sustained warm/FB-banner windows across entire video.

totals.confidence: HIGH (read directly from Battle Records screen)

boss.evidence: base non-core popup = 110,715 = 0.7109 x 1.30(Magnum) x ATK with NO element multiplier; no advantage up-arrow on popups

atk_derivation.note: back-derived: 110715/(0.7109*1.30)=119824; 230008/1.92=119796. ~1.5% above provided combat ATK 118027. Damage-screen ATK stat shown = 93436 (base/pre-buff stat).

cadence.reload_gap_note: measured muzzle-spark-off to muzzle-spark-on (51 frames @30fps); LONGER than kit 81f/1.35s because it includes gun lower/raise animation. Bullets keep landing into the gap (projectile travel + counter tween).
cadence.shots_per_sec_note: ammo counter (center 00X box) ~1 round/0.4s = 2.5/s; fire-run/9 rounds = ~3.1/s

dot.source: S2 Acid Ammo sustained DoT (192% final ATK / 1s, 30s, re-applied each reload -> effectively permanent)
dot.tick_crit_note: 345012 = 230008 x 1.5; the acid DoT can crit (orange popup)
dot.derivation: 230008 = 1.92 x 119796 (final ATK); isolated cleanly during reload-idle (counter stepped +230008 exactly once per 1.0s with no shots in flight)
dot.confidence: tick value + cadence HIGH; fight-share MEDIUM (tick count estimated, some ticks crit)

per_shot.crit_core_note: expected 110715*2*1.5; not cleanly isolated in sampled frames
per_shot.relations: crit = base x1.5; core = base x2.0; base = 0.7109(normalMult) x 1.30(S1 Magnum +30%) x ATK

core_fraction.note: RANGE-DEPENDENT. Boss-far mag (34.2-37.5s) reconciled to ~123k avg/shot -> ~5-15% core. Boss-close mag (44-46s) showed frequent red CORE HIT -> ~30-50% core. Fight-average effective per-shot ~123-127k (~1.12x base) => modest average core+crit uplift ~12%.

raw_damage_counter_series.note: top-center running DAMAGE total (team=Jill). video seconds -> total
raw_damage_counter_series.idle_dot_isolation_33to35s: counter steps +230008 exactly per 1.0s during reload idle (no shots) -> pure DoT tick
